unit.note: Data-only detective-audit reconciliation (event-log backfill + audit-config g2_stoplist + bloat-baseline LOC). No client/**, server/**, or test file changed, so the app Vitest/Playwright suites are invariant. Empirical verification is the re-run detective audit (B/D/G/H any_fail:False) + bloat anti_ratchet_check --worktree (exit 0).

surface_verification.justification: Data-only detective-audit reconciliation: the diff touches only tracked metadata (shipwright_events.jsonl, audit_config.json, shipwright_bloat_baseline.json, .shipwright/triage.jsonl) — no client/**, server/**, API route, store, SSE/WS handler, or message-contract file, so the Backend-affects-Frontend rule does not trigger and surface=none is correct. The one config boundary touched is audit_config.json's g2_stoplist consumed by the detective audit; its round-trip is empirically proven by re-running run_audit.py --only B,D,G,H against the worktree (parsed all three edited files, returned any_fail:False) plus anti_ratchet_check.py --worktree exit 0. tests_run=0 is therefore justified.

test_completeness.justification: Data-only compliance reconciliation (B7 event backfill x3, D3 FR-01.44 reaffirmation amend, G2 stoplist registration x4, H1 two bloat-baseline additions, H2 three LOC tightenings). spec_impact=none, change_type=compliance — no product AC/behavior is introduced or changed, so there is no testable product behavior to enumerate. Empirical completeness IS the detective audit (B/D/G/H all PASS: 47 commits matched, every promised FR reaffirmed, every scope resolves, all oversize files baselined, baseline LOC matches on-disk) plus anti-ratchet exit 0.
